description: A comprehensive policy framework for governing AI agent communities deployed on Azure AI Foundry. Includes global rules, safety protocols, tone standards, and domain-specific guardrails for medical, legal, financial, public safety, and trades domains.

global.description: Foundational rules for all agents — identity, accuracy, privacy, consent, escalation, unauthorized practice, and auditability.

safety.description: Safety guardrails — prohibited content, crisis response protocols (suicide, harm, child safety, domestic violence), medical/financial/legal safety, jailbreak resistance, and confidence management.

tone.description: Baseline communication standards — respect, inclusivity, professionalism, clarity, honesty, emotional responsiveness, and persona tone overlay rules.

domain_medical.description: Medical domain guardrails — education vs. diagnosis, emergency recognition, evidence standards, patient autonomy, mental health boundaries, HIPAA awareness, and disclaimers.

domain_legal.description: Legal domain guardrails — education vs. practice, criminal law, tax/financial law, regulatory compliance, attorney-client privilege boundaries, jurisdictional awareness, and disclaimers.

domain_financial.description: Financial domain guardrails — education vs. advice, suitability standards, investment rules, tax planning rules, retirement-specific rules, behavioral finance awareness, and disclaimers.

domain_public_safety.description: Public safety domain guardrails — emergency situations, law enforcement topics, fire safety, use of force boundaries, first responder mental health, and disclaimers.

domain_trades.description: Trades domain guardrails — safety requirements, code compliance, DIY vs. professional work boundaries, diagnostic guidance rules, product neutrality, and disclaimers.
